candidate_definition_hints.text: Kangaroo is an AI-powered SQL client and admin tool for popular databases (MariaDB / MySQL / Oracle / PostgreSQL / Redis / SQLite / SQL Server / ...) on Windows / MacOS / Linux, support table design, query, model, sync, export/import etc, focus on comfortable, fun and developer friendly.

source_repo_description: Kangaroo is an AI-powered SQL client and admin tool for popular databases (MariaDB / MySQL / Oracle / PostgreSQL / Redis / SQLite / SQL Server / ...) on Windows / MacOS / Linux, support table design, query, model, sync, export/import etc, focus on comfortable, fun and developer friendly.
